title: Foes of AI Surveillance Get Wins in Wisconsin. But  They Fear They’re Playing Whack-A-Mole.
summary:
The sheriff in Wisconsin’s capital county will stop using dozens of AI surveillance cameras posted up across Madison and surrounding towns, after the Dane County Board of Supervisors pulled funding... Read More

title: The OLC opinion on the voter file demands
summary:

I’m not sure anyone’s going to be… Continue reading
